components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Mirewinder Parallel Biode
components.description:
Controls the electrical flow throughout the circuitry within robotic organisms.

Source: Dismantled from Mirewinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Mirewinder in Orb Vallis caves during any weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Radian Sentirum
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Spectral Debris
components.description:
Discharged specter particles form an inert dust that can be collected and re-energized for various robotic projects.

Location: Errant Specters in the Granum Void (Corpus Ship Tileset)
